title: Loop con invariante
prompt: Help me implement an in-place partition function for quicksort (the Lomuto or Hoare scheme — your choice). I want to see the loop invariant, prove the loop maintains it, and prove termination with a bounding function. Language: Python.

assertions.text: Explicitly states the loop invariant as a logical predicate
Shows that the loop body maintains the invariant
Provides a bounding function (variant) that decreases on each iteration
The partition function is correct and would work in quicksort
Implementation is in Python as requested
